title: ARM-PickUpItems
description: The mod displays a short notification (in the corner of the screen) whenever you pick up any item. The information includes: The item’s name; an icon; the quantity (if applicable); sometimes — the rarity or quality (indicated by a colored)
body:
![Discription](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d883226b52f8aceb9a08ca8fa87c75d6699f8bb.png)

**_Mod «ARM‑ItemPickUp»_**

We present a convenient module that makes the process of obtaining items in the game clear and informative. Now every picked‑up item will be accompanied by a pop‑up notification with key details.

What can the module do?

**The module adds:**

- _Informative notifications — when you pick up an item, you’ll see its icon, name, and quantity;_
- _Color coding — the rarity of an item is instantly recognizable by the notification’s color (for example, elite items are highlighted in pink);_
- _Customizable visual effects — you can adjust the number of displayed notifications and particle effects._

**Intuitive color system:**
_Common items — neutral tones;
Elite items — bright, eye‑catching colors (for example, a pink notification for the «Enchanted Golden Apple»)._

**_Commands:_**

```
/armitempickup time <seconds> - Changes the duration for which the notification is displayed.
/armitempickup max <count> - Limits the number of notifications displayed.
/armitempickup particle <true|false> - Enables or disables particle effects for elite items.
```
